milestone: M0 — Contract simplification and pre-implementation hardening
validatedSourceCommitMessage: Align secure archive workflow before implementation

environment.type: GitHub repository documentation and control review

validatedAction: Reviewed the exact merged workflow-alignment commit and PR #5, verified the binding contract and dependent controls were aligned, confirmed both automated review findings were fixed and resolved before merge, checked active startup and phase-control files for stale references, and confirmed application implementation was absent.
actions: Reviewed merged PR #5 and exact merge commit c93b38b7e41ffbb50c82b4f8389e71ef511ac54d.
Reviewed the 17 changed documentation and project-control files.
Verified the source workflow accepts employee UPN or OneDrive root URL and requires Scan before Start Copy.
Verified employee-password collection, employee impersonation, Microsoft 365 write permissions, and source modification are prohibited.
Verified SQLite remains the operational source of truth and CSV/JSON remain audit reports only.
Verified Incomplete is required for failed supported content, unsupported content, or an unstable source snapshot.
Verified raw Graph drive and item identifiers are excluded from the normal scan UI and user-facing errors.
Verified M0 and M1 status controls no longer contradict one another.
Verified repository searches returned no OneDriveServerTransfer.sln, no project SDK file, and no App.xaml application entry point.
Verified no passwords, tokens, client secrets, employee content, temporary download URLs, production state databases, or unredacted production reports were introduced.

rawArtifactOrReviewLocation.pullRequest: PR #5 — Align secure archive workflow before implementation

limitationsAndUnexecutedChecks: Windows dependency restore was not executed.
Windows Release build was not executed.
Automated application tests were not executed.
Microsoft interactive sign-in was not executed.
Real tenant validation was not executed.
Employee UPN or OneDrive URL resolution was not executed.
Dry run, file copy, interruption, resume, reconciliation, reporting, and publish were not executed.
Production NTFS, encryption, access-removal, and Windows Server acceptance were not executed.
This evidence justifies Documentation Ready only; it does not justify Source Implementation Complete or Production Ready.
